data.title: Announcement from Eimskip
data.description: Today, the Icelandic District Prosecutor has halted the investigation into Eimskip's Chief Operational Officer regarding the sale of two vessels. The Environment Agency of Iceland had raised concerns to the District Prosecutor in 2020. Consequently, the individual's status as a defendant has been terminated, officially closing the case against them.

data.title: California Manufacturers Power Artemis II Mission Success
data.description: In Sacramento, California on April 13, 2026, the safe return of NASA's Artemis II mission to Earth has been celebrated. The California Manufacturers & Technology Association (CMTA) is acknowledging the significant contribution of California manufacturers to this monumental human spaceflight achievement.

data.title: In HelloNation, Tire Recycling Expert Kimberly McCulla Shares Insight on Public Health and Scrap Tire Recycling
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky on April 13, 2026, a recent article highlighted the severe risks posed by abandoned tires to public health and the environment. Kimberly McCulla from Kentuckiana Tire Recycling emphasized the dangers of incorrectly disposing of tires, which can lead to hazardous conditions that jeopardize both public health and the environment. Improperly discarded tires create a significant threat due to the potential for environmental contamination and breeding grounds for disease-carrying vectors. McCulla stressed the importance of proper tire disposal to mitigate these risks and protect communities.

data.title: J King Images Celebrates Grand Opening of Downtown Woodstock Studio
data.description: A photography studio, J King Images, marked the inauguration of its new studio in Woodstock, Georgia on March 19, 2026. The City of Woodstock presided over the ribbon-cutting ceremony, with Mayor Michael Caldwell in attendance. Following the event, owner Jerry King was honored by peers and local business representatives at a reception hosted by Arlene Dickerson, CEO & Founder of Technical Resource Solutions. The studio boasts modern facilities and equipment, symbolizing a new era for J King Images in the community.

data.title: Thompson Thrift Expands National Footprint to 24 States with Reno, Nevada Development
data.description: In Reno, Nevada, on April 13, 2026, Thompson Thrift, a prominent real estate company and top multifamily developer in the nation, unveiled plans for Argent Flats, a new multifamily community comprising of 273 units. This project signifies the company's continued growth and dedication to expanding their presence in the region.

data.title: Velo Med Spa Introduces alloClae®: The Next Evolution in Non-Surgical Body Contouring
data.description: In Bonita Springs, Florida, on April 13, 2026, Velo Med Spa announced the launch of alloClae® Structural Adipose Filler. This product is a groundbreaking non-surgical treatment that aims to revolutionize advanced aesthetic procedures. Velo Med Spa, known for its cutting-edge offerings in Southwest Florida, is excited to introduce this innovative solution to their clients.

data.title: TBL Team Boxing League Finalizes Landmark Partnership with Manny Pacquiao, Who Enters Franchise Ownership
data.description: On April 13, 2026, in New York, TBL Team Boxing League (TBL) and Manny Pacquiao Promotions (MPP) confirmed a significant collaboration with Manny Pacquiao, facilitating his shift from renowned boxer to franchise proprietor and enduring investor in the industry.

data.title: Bitcoin Reclaims $72,000, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Spike 1.5%
data.description: Bitcoin has surged above $72,000 amid optimism for a potential agreement between the U.S. and Iran, driving a positive market sentiment. The current prices for top cryptocurrencies are Bitcoin at $72,392, Ethereum at $2,232, Solana at $83.11, XRP at $1.33, Dogecoin at $0.09165, and Shiba Inu at $0.05760. Recent data reveals that 153,900 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, resulting in losses totaling $247.07 million. Additionally, there were net inflows of $256.8 million from spot Bitcoin ETFs and $64.95 million from spot Ethereum ETFs on Friday. Noteworthy gainers in the past day include RaveDAO, Venice Token, and PancakeSwap. For more details, visit Benzinga.com for the full story on the latest developments in the crypto market.

data.title: Howmet Aerospace Announces New Executive Leadership Member
data.description: In Pittsburgh on April 13, 2026, Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) shared the news of Jonathan Arena's appointment as Executive Vice President, Chief Legal and Compliance Officer, and Secretary. Arena will be part of the Howmet Aerospace Executive Leadership Team, marking a significant addition to the company's leadership.

data.title: Bitcoin's struggle to sustain uptrend persists as price hovers around $70,000-$75,000 range. Factors include weak ETF demand, rising US treasury yields, and profit-taking amid resistance.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin is striving to maintain its position above the $70,000 to $75,000 range. However, demand for Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) is sluggish. This is occurring concurrently with an increase in US Treasury yields. Traders are also cashing in on profits as the price of Bitcoin faces resistance at its current levels.

data.title: Warning: Dormant Bitcoin wallets with public keys at risk from quantum computing. Stay alert to safeguard your assets.
data.description: Some Bitcoin accounts may be more vulnerable to quantum computing risks than others. Dormant wallets with public keys exposed could be the initial targets for potential attacks.

data.title: Owner Resource Group Partners with Premier Property Locating Services Firm, Smart City Locating, Inc.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Owner Resource Group, LLC (ORG), a private investment firm, has finalized an investment in Smart City Locating, Inc. The company, established in 2013 by Cassie Brown, is a top property locating service provider. Smart City specializes in assisting property managers nationwide to fill vacancies.ORG's affiliates have successfully sealed the deal with Smart City, a market leader in property locating services.

data.title: Palantir, SpaceX, L3Harris and More Defense and AI Stars Align At Space Symposium 2026
data.description: The annual Space Symposium hosted by the Space Foundation in Colorado Springs has evolved into a significant hub for deals within the global space economy. The upcoming 2026 event is anticipated to emphasize the close link between defense, data, and commercial innovation. Beginning in 1984 as a gathering of 250 individuals, the symposium has grown into a prominent event attracting over 12,000 professionals from 60+ countries, including government agencies, militaries, commercial entities, R&D experts, and investors. Analysts from Cantor Fitzgerald have highlighted the event as "material to the industry" and as the "biggest global space event in the world." This four-day program is expected to be influential and beneficial for participants. Additionally, Palantir's (PLTR) stock is currently experiencing movement. Further information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Costa Rica Blue: essential COSTA RICA launches new platform to explore and protect the country's oceans
data.description: A new digital platform has been launched to provide interactive and educational content highlighting marine biodiversity and advocating for ocean conservation efforts. Costa Rica, known for hosting around 3.5% of all documented marine species globally, is at the forefront of this initiative. The platform aims to raise awareness and educate the public on the importance of protecting our oceans. This project is being spearheaded from San José, Costa Rica, as of April 13, 2026.
